name: Healthplus
description_short: HealthPlus Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Mississippi State Department of Health employees and their families with NCUA-insured deposit accounts and lending services.
description_long:
HealthPlus Federal Credit Union (HealthPlus FCU) is a federally insured credit union operating under the motto "Committed to Your Financial Health." The institution serves a specific membership base: employees and contract workers of the Mississippi State Department of Health, their family members, retirees from that employment, credit union employees and their families, and related organizations. This defined field of membership reflects HealthPlus FCU's roots as a mission-driven financial cooperative designed to serve a particular professional community rather than the general public.

HealthPlus FCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products and services typical of modern credit unions. Members can access checking accounts with debit and ATM cards, overdraft protection on checking accounts, credit cards (balance information available through ezcardinfo.com), savings vehicles including Christmas Club accounts, and various loan products. The credit union partners with Sallie Mae to offer student loans, and members can view loan rates and savings rates through the institution's online platform. Online banking is available 24/7 for account management, loan payments, and bill payments. All member deposits are protected up to $250,000 per account type by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) Share Insurance Fund.

What distinguishes HealthPlus FCU is its exclusive membership model tied to Mississippi State Department of Health employment, which creates a tight-knit member community with aligned financial needs. The institution emphasizes the safety and stability of member deposits through NCUA insurance and positions itself as a stable, reliable investment option. The credit union operates with a fiduciary duty to members and encourages adoption of online banking as the primary service channel. Their partnership with established third-party providers (Sallie Mae for student loans, EZCardInfo for credit card management) suggests integration with broader financial ecosystems.

As a smaller regional credit union with a restricted membership base, HealthPlus FCU is best suited for its specific eligible population rather than the general public. Members benefit from the security of NCUA insurance and personalized service, but prospective borrowers should understand that membership eligibility is limited and geographic/employment-based. The institution provides solid foundational banking services but does not appear to offer specialized products like mortgages, business loans, or advanced investment vehicles based on available website information.
services: Checking accounts with debit and ATM cards
Credit cards with online balance management (ezcardinfo.com)
Savings accounts with NCUA insurance up to $250,000 per account type
Student loans in partnership with Sallie Mae
Online banking platform (24/7 account access, bill pay, loan payments)
Lost or stolen card replacement services
pros: NCUA deposit insurance covers up to $250,000 per account type, protecting member savings
24/7 online banking platform for account management, bill pay, and loan payments
Overdraft protection available on checking accounts to prevent overdraft fees
Partnership with Sallie Mae for student loan options integrated into membership benefits
Checking accounts include debit and ATM card access for convenient fund access
No membership fees mentioned; operates as member-owned cooperative with fiduciary duty
Dedicated fraud prevention with lost/stolen card hotline (1-888-263-3370)
cons: Membership restricted to Mississippi State Department of Health employees and families—not open to general public
Limited online information about specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules requires calling 601-354-6633
No mention of mortgage lending, investment services, or business loan products available
Regional credit union with limited branch/ATM network compared to larger national institutions
Website does not clearly explain Christmas Club account mechanics or savings rates on deposit products
best_for: Mississippi State Department of Health employees and their immediate family members
Retirees from Mississippi State Department of Health seeking stable, insured savings
Students of eligible members seeking Sallie Mae-partnered student loan options
Credit union members prioritizing NCUA-insured deposits and personalized member service
diagnosis: HealthPlus FCU is exclusively designed for Mississippi State Department of Health employees, retirees, and their families—it is not accessible to the general public. This credit union is best for eligible members seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts and basic consumer lending in a member-owned cooperative environment, but prospective customers must verify employment or family eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
